summary: Use pnpm (not npm) for this repo
details: User corrected package manager choice. The repo uses pnpm workspaces and has pnpm-lock.yaml. Our instruction to run 'npm install' failed CI due to lock mismatch.
suggested_action: Document 'pnpm install' as the default. Update CI and scripts to use pnpm.

summary: SSL monitor reported failures for staging and old-cert domains
details: staging.example.com returned dns_error; old-cert.example.org returned expired; edge.api.example.com within 5 days of expiry. See input/ssl_results.json.
error_messages: DNS resolution failed: [Errno -2] Name or service not known

summary: Auto-cluster review pain points and export to CSV
details: During market analysis, user asked for automatic theme clustering from product reviews and a CSV export of the gap table.
user_context: They want to share the findings with stakeholders without manual cleanup.
suggested_implementation: Use keyword extraction + LLM clustering; write results to data/export/market_gaps.csv

summary: Misunderstood default warn-days for SSL monitor
details: We assumed --warn-days defaulted to 30; jrv_ssl_monitor defaults to 14. For prod-critical domains we agreed to use 21 by default.
suggested_action: Set warn-days to 21 for prod domains; document threshold policy.

summary: Batch SSL checks and use JSON output for automation
details: Running a single batched command with --json simplifies parsing and avoids missing partial failures. Treat non-'ok' statuses (expired, dns_error, verification_failed) as failures in CI.
suggested_action: Use check_ssl.py across all domains with --json; gate CI on exit codes.

summary: Corrected product taxonomy: ergonomic vs gaming chairs
details: User corrected our grouping: split desk chairs into ergonomic and gaming categories for clarity in gap analysis.
suggested_action: Update taxonomy in market analysis templates.
